category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI for interacting with Rekor; official Sigstore docs https://docs.sigstore.dev/logging/overview/ describe Rekor as an immutable transparency ledger.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and executable are rekor-cli; official Sigstore CLI docs use rekor-cli commands at https://docs.sigstore.dev/logging/cli/.
docs_sources: Official Sigstore documentation has Rekor overview, CLI, and installation pages under https://docs.sigstore.dev/logging/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/sigstore/rekor; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Sigstore Rekor docs at https://docs.sigstore.dev/logging/overview/ describe Rekor's supply-chain transparency role; source_facts.description identifies the CLI.
